'''sarate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:warlikely|warlikely]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-r-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:warlikely|warlikely]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sarate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:sarate|sarate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:saratesher|saratesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:saratesherĂ«m|saratesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:saratero|saratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sarateshĂ«|sarateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sarateshĂ«m|sarateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisaratero|gokisaratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisarateshĂ«|gokisarateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisarateshĂ«m|gokisarateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosarankerom|gosarankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosarankeshĂ«|gosarankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosarankeshĂ«m|gosarankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosarankeya|gosarankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:saraterom|saraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:saratemu|saratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sarateya|sarateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisaraterom|gokisaraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisaratemu|gokisaratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisarateya|gokisarateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:sararate|sararate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sararatesher|sararatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sararatesherĂ«m|sararatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sararatero|sararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sararateshĂ«|sararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sararateshĂ«m|sararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisararatero|gokisararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisararateshĂ«|gokisararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisararateshĂ«m|gokisararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosararankerom|gosararankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosararankeshĂ«|gosararankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosararankeshĂ«m|gosararankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosararankeya|gosararankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sararaterom|sararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sararatemu|sararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sararateya|sararateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisararaterom|gokisararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisararatemu|gokisararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisararateya|gokisararateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:sĂŠrĂŠte|sĂŠrĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sĂŠrĂŠtesher|sĂŠrĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m|sĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠrĂŠtero|sĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|sĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|sĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠrĂŠtero|gokisĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|gokisĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|gokisĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosĂŠrĂŠnkerom|gosĂŠrĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«|gosĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gosĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosĂŠrĂŠnkeya|gosĂŠrĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠrĂŠterom|sĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠrĂŠtemu|sĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sĂŠrĂŠteya|sĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠrĂŠterom|gokisĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠrĂŠtemu|gokisĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisĂŠrĂŠteya|gokisĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:safrafte|safrafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:safraftesher|safraftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safraftesherĂ«m|safraftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safraftero|safraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:safrafteshĂ«|safrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safrafteshĂ«m|safrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafraftero|gokisafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisafrafteshĂ«|gokisafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafrafteshĂ«m|gokisafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosafrafnkerom|gosafrafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosafrafnkeshĂ«|gosafrafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosafrafnkeshĂ«m|gosafrafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosafrafnkeya|gosafrafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safrafterom|safrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safraftemu|safraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:safrafteya|safrafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafrafterom|gokisafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafraftemu|gokisafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisafrafteya|gokisafrafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
